form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Last run sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 10 at Belmont Park 0Mwly on April 2 over 1200m, 7 len behind Snippy Which with 59.5kg at $5. At only start last preparation raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Canterbury Bm72 on February 21 2025 over 1250m, 1.3 len behind Tenderize with 59.5kg at $3.60. Happy to risk.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Racing second-up today. Last run sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 10 at Belmont Park 0Mwly on April 2 over 1200m, 7 len behind Snippy Which with 59.5kg at $5. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Held up for clear running from the 400m until near the 200m.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 1.4 len at Albany Rtg 58+ March 26 over 1100m on a soft track defeating Hezangelic carrying 58.5kg at $2.40. The race before that favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 2 len at Albany Rtg 58+ March 19 over 1230m in soft going defeating Top Of The Pops with 57kg at $3.30. In terrific form and can take the next step.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4.5). Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 1.4 len at Albany Rtg 58+ March 26 over 1100m on a soft track defeating Hezangelic carrying 58.5kg at $2.40. The race before that favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 2 len at Albany Rtg 58+ March 19 over 1230m in soft going defeating Top Of The Pops with 57kg at $3.30. In terrific form and can take the next step.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Steadied when close to heels near the 400m.
Held up for clear running from on straightening until passing the 150m.
Bumped and buffeted on jumping, losing 1L.

form.formComment: At the latest run ran last of 11 at Ascot Grad Hcp 60+ on April 1 over 1200m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Maalis Song with 58kg at $71. The start before that 3rd of 8 at this track Cl5 on March 5 over 1200m, 2 len behind Prawns Eleven with 55kg at $7.50. The gate is against.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). At the latest run ran last of 11 at Ascot Grad Hcp 60+ on April 1 over 1200m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Maalis Song with 58kg at $71. The start before that 3rd of 8 at this track Cl5 on March 5 over 1200m, 2 len behind Prawns Eleven with 55kg at $7.50. The gate is against.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced only fairly. Had a tendency to race keenly through the early stages.
Raced keenly through the middle stages when leading. Tired in the straight.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 6th of 9 at Ascot Westspeed Plat on April 1 over 1100m, on a slow track; 2.75 len behind Girls Day Out carrying 55kg at $3.60. Previously second-up 3rd of 10 at Belmont Park 0Mwly on August 6 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Hit The Jackpot with 56kg at $4. Has ability but hasn't won for a long while.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Second-up. Previously second-up 3rd of 10 at Belmont Park 0Mwly on August 6 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Hit The Jackpot with 56kg at $4. Has ability but hasn't won for a long while.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lay out under pressure in the straight.
Carried wide rounding the home turn.
From a wide barrier shifted in behind runners.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 48-day let-up. First-up after five months 7th of 13 at Bunbury Prov Series on February 26 over 1400m, 6 len behind Azena with 57kg at $31. Previously second-up 6th of 15 at Belmont Park Rtg 65+ on May 17 over 1400m, 2 len behind Speed Dream with 56kg at $26. Has won second up before but this looks a bit rich.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Second run back. Comes off a 48-day let-up. First-up after five months 7th of 13 at Bunbury Prov Series on February 26 over 1400m, 6 len behind Azena with 57kg at $31. Previously second-up 6th of 15 at Belmont Park Rtg 65+ on May 17 over 1400m, 2 len behind Speed Dream with 56kg at $26. Has won second up before but this looks a bit rich.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after nearly two years 2nd in a small field at Belmont Park Cl3 on April 2 over 1000m, 2 len behind Niccimota with 57kg at $5. Previously second-up 2nd of 12 at Ballarat Synthetic Bm70 on June 18 2024 over 1200m, 0.5 len behind Rosalia carrying 57kg at $3.50. Fitter and the former Victorian has plenty up her sleeve.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(1). Second-up. First-up after nearly two years 2nd in a small field at Belmont Park Cl3 on April 2 over 1000m, 2 len behind Niccimota with 57kg at $5. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 50m, shifted ground before being straightened by the rider.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of three months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign by nose Mt Barker Rtg 58+ January 18 over 1300m defeating Skytalker with 55.5kg at $3.20. When resuming last campaign fifth of 7 at Northam Cl1 October 8 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Manjeri carrying 58kg at $8. Deserves plenty of consideration.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-1.5). Mare back from a spell of three months. Has placed previously first up from a break. When resuming last campaign fifth of 7 at Northam Cl1 October 8 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Manjeri carrying 58kg at $8. Deserves plenty of consideration.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Blundered on jumping, unbalancing its rider subsequently losing ground.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months got back early 8th of 10 at Belmont Park 0Mwly on April 2 over 1200m, 4 len behind Snippy Which carrying 56.5kg at $21. Previously second-up settled well back; won by a neck at Belmont Park 0Mwly August 27 over 1200m on a rain affected track defeating Linden's Gold with 56kg at $21. Didn't do enough first up to raise hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bounded on jumping and slow into stride, losing 1L.
Pulled hard through the early and middle stages when leading.
Crowded and bumped shortly after the start. Lay inwards in the straight.

form.formComment: Comes off a 60 day let-up. Last start raced on the speed throughout before fading 8th of 12 at Pinjarra Grad Hcp 60+ on February 14 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Hey Pino with 57.5kg at $31. The race before that 6th of 10 at Ascot Grad Hcp 60+ on January 24 over 1200m, 4 len behind Bohemian Diamond with 58kg at $6. Prefer to see him back in form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced awkwardly. Raced keenly through the early stages.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Taken back from wide barrier at the start.
Raced wide throughout. Lay inwards in the straight.
